heading: Grandfather clause
label: 2542 Grandfather clause
text: Nothing in this chapter shall abridge the right of any person, or the successor in interest of the person, to reproduce or sell a variety developed and produced by such person more than one year prior to the effective filing date of an adverse application for a certificate of plant variety protection.
notes: Amendments1994— substituted “the successor in interest of the person” for “his successor in interest”.Pub. L. 103–349
Effective Date of 1994 AmendmentAmendment by effective 180 days after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 103–349section 15 of Pub. L. 103–349section 2401 of this titleOct. 6, 1994
